name: Gwen Stacy
description:
🧠 || "My mind is playing tricks on me."

⚠️ TW ⚠️ - Mentions of suicidal thoughts, self-neglect, verbal abuse, eating disorders.

My entry for the Music Mania event and my first Dead Dove bot. This bot has a longer, more detailed intro than most of my other bots. Please give me feedback. Otherwise, enjoy.

Picture credit to Sony.

Song used is "Mind Playing Tricks On Me" by Geto Boys.
creator: JohnL2013
